title: Baby Keepsake Box, New Baby Gift Box Two Ready to Fill Cream Gift Box for Newborn Essentials - Baby Gift Boxes - New Baby Box for Small & Medium Sized DIY Shower Gifts for Baby Boys or Girls
features: Baby Shower Gifts: Perfect for presenting a new baby gift, these carry case boxes are crafted from top-quality materials and feature a unique hand-drawn New Baby illustration. Sizes: 25x17.5x8.5 cm and 22.8x15.5x7 cm.

Create Your Own Gift Set: These keepsake boxes for baby girls or boys fit a variety of small to medium gifts and include a gift tag for a personal message. Tie your gift with the supplied ribbon for a unique and impressive presentation.

Value for Money: These 2 beautiful keepsake boxes are ideal for new parents to store mementoes like mittens, shoes, and first teeth. They keep cherished items safe and are perfect for saving keepsakes like cards and toys for future enjoyment.

Making the Right Choice: Finding the right present for a new baby can be a difficult task because of the wide range available. Baby Box Shop offers you a value for money choice in this baby keepsake gifts box option

Buy With Confidence: At Baby Box Shop, we create every keepsake box and baby boy hamper in the UK. All products are carefully boxed for perfect delivery. All soft toys meet EN71 European Safety Standards and are safe from birth.
